Interface IExportItemsParameters3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides additional access to members that control parameters to an operation on a mosaic dataset.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("1ACBF4CD-E0E4-491B-A062-5CB436EC980E")]
public interface IExportItemsParameters3 : IExportItemsParameters2, IExportItemsParameters
